name: real estate portfolio managers managing 5–15 properties tool
description: For real estate portfolio managers processing 5–15 properties, inaccurate tracking of rents causes financial discrepancies. We provide automated monthly statements instead of manual spreadsheets and email statements.
target_audience: real estate portfolio managers managing 5–15 properties
problem_solved: Inaccurate tracking of rents and occupancy costs leads to financial discrepancies.
